name: Frijoles Negros (Black Beans)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans in a large (covered) soup pot with enough water to cover them for at least six to eight hours. Add two bay leaves and a few drops of olive oil to the water.
2. Cook the beans over high heat for 90 minutes, checking frequently to ensure there is enough water covering the beans.
3. Once tender, prepare a sofrito by combining chopped onion, green pepper, garlic, oregano, ground pepper, and olive oil in a small frying pan. Cook over medium-high heat for six to eight minutes, stirring frequently.
4. Add the sofrito to the black beans and reduce the heat on the beans to low. Mix well with the beans, pressing some of them with a slotted spoon. Add salt and sugar, then simmer for half an hour. Remove bay leaves and serve.
